import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import StatCard from '../components/StatCard'; const Analytics = () => { const [bikes, setBikes] = useState([]); useEffect(() => { fetch('http://localhost:5002/api/bikes') .then(res => res.json()) .then(data => { if (data.success) setBikes(data.data); else if (Array.isArray(data)) setBikes(data); }) .catch(() => { }); }, []); // Revenue data const monthlyRevenue = [ { month: 'Jan', value: 45000 }, { month: 'Feb', value: 62000 }, { month: 'Mar', value: 55000 }, { month: 'Apr', value: 78000 }, { month: 'May', value: 85000 }, { month: 'Jun', value: 92000 }, { month: 'Jul', value: 88000 }, { month: 'Aug', value: 95000 }, { month: 'Sep', value: 72000 }, { month: 'Oct', value: 68000 }, { month: 'Nov', value: 80000 }, { month: 'Dec', value: 98000 }, ]; const maxMontlyRev = Math.max(...monthlyRevenue.map(m => m.value)); // Daily bookings const dailyBookings = [ { day: 'Mon', value: 8 }, { day: 'Tue', value: 12 }, { day: 'Wed', value: 10 }, { day: 'Thu', value: 15 }, { day: 'Fri', value: 18 }, { day: 'Sat', value: 22 }, { day: 'Sun', value: 20 }, ]; const maxDaily = Math.max(...dailyBookings.map(d => d.value)); // Top performing bikes const topBikes = [ { name: 'Royal Enfield Classic 350', bookings: 45, revenue: '₹67,500' }, { name: 'NS 200', bookings: 38, revenue: '₹68,400' }, { name: 'GT 650', bookings: 32, revenue: '₹80,000' }, { name: 'DUKE 200', bookings: 28, revenue: '₹53,200' }, { name: 'MT 15', bookings: 24, revenue: '₹38,400' }, ]; // Category breakdown const categories = [ { name: 'Sports', count: 3, revenue: '₹1,60,000', percent: 55 }, { name: 'Cruiser', count: 3, revenue: '₹1,25,400', percent: 45 }, ]; // Customer metrics const customerMetrics = [ { label: 'New Customers (This Month)', value: '32', trend: 'up', trendValue: '18%' }, { label: 'Repeat Booking Rate', value: '68%', trend: 'up', trendValue: '5%' }, { label: 'Avg. Booking Duration', value: '3.2 days', trend: 'down', trendValue: '0.3' }, { label: 'Customer Satisfaction', value: '4.8/5', trend: 'up', trendValue: '0.2' }, ]; return (
{/* KPI Stats */}
{/* Revenue Chart + Daily Bookings */}

Monthly Revenue

↑ 15% vs last year
{monthlyRevenue.map(item => (
₹{(item.value / 1000).toFixed(0)}K
{item.month}
))}

Bookings by Day

This Week
{dailyBookings.map(item => (
{item.value}
{item.day}
))}
{/* Top Bikes + Category Breakdown */}

Top Performing Bikes

By Bookings
{topBikes.map((bike, i) => (
{i + 1}
{bike.name}
{bike.bookings} bookings
{bike.revenue}
))}

Category Breakdown

{categories.map((cat, i) => (
{cat.name} {cat.count} bikes
{cat.revenue}
))}

Customer Metrics

{customerMetrics.map((metric, i) => (
{metric.label}
{metric.value} {metric.trend === 'up' ? '↑' : '↓'} {metric.trendValue}
))}
); }; export default Analytics;
